name: Houdini Action: Open HIP
description: Creates a Houdini action to open a .hip/.hipnc/.hiplc scene file. Chain multiple action nodes together via actions_in/actions_out, then feed the final actions_out into a Houdini Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    hip_path = inputs.get('hip_path') or self.get_parameter('hip_path', '')
    action = {'type': 'open_hip', 'hip_path': hip_path}
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added open_hip action -> {hip_path}')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
